# six50 solutions LLC

> AI strategy & operations advisory combining Big Four financial rigor with practical AI-driven automation. Founded by Adil Ghazali, CPA (15+ years PricewaterhouseCoopers). Serving founder-led and PE-backed businesses in the $2M-$50M revenue range. Based in Aurora, IL - serving clients nationally.

## What We Do

six50 sits at the intersection of finance and technology. We fix finances and build automated systems that eliminate manual work.

**Financial Leadership & Accounting**
- Fractional CFO services
- Accounting & Controller Services
- Financial Readiness (audit prep, fundraise prep)
- Transaction Support (M&A, due diligence)

**AI & Automation Implementation**
- Workflow automation design and build
- Custom reporting & operational dashboards
- AI integration (LLMs, agents, chatbots)
- Process design and documentation (BPMN)

## Who We Serve

- Founder-led businesses between $2M-$50M in revenue
- Private equity-backed portfolio companies
- Companies at inflection points: rapid growth, transaction prep, or operational complexity
- Financial services, healthcare, and operations-driven organizations

## Products

- **Finclar** (finclar.dev) - AI-powered financial intelligence SaaS for board-level analysis, covenant tracking, and strategic CFO reporting
- **Flowtation** - BPMN process mapping tool for AI-era operations documentation
- **VibesSync** - AI-powered content and live experience platform

## Engagement Models

- **Digital Clarity Assessment** - Entry-level: tech stack audit, workflow analysis, AI opportunity assessment, 30-day roadmap
- **Automation & AI Build** - Project-based execution (CRM, dashboards, chatbots, workflows)
- **Ongoing Advisor** - Retainer: strategic advisory, KPI monitoring, continuous AI optimization

## Founding Team

**Adil Ghazali, CPA** - Founder & Managing Principal
15+ years PricewaterhouseCoopers Senior Manager, Financial Services Transformation. Banking, insurance, capital markets, risk governance, regulatory remediation, mortgage/lending, technology transformation. NIU MS/BS Accounting, CPA Illinois.

## Location & Contact

- Aurora, IL (Chicago Metro Area) - serving clients nationally
- Website: https://six50.io
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/adil-ghazali-7457039/
